item.title: L 01 - Introduction
item.description: Nodes are any device which can send or receive data or both, that is called node. Communication link can be wired or wireless link.

item.title: Scaling
item.description: Scaling - Horizontal Scaling Vertical Scaling We may ask, why can’t we have a one big computer with lot of CPU and RAM to server the thousands of request? Problems are - When there are high traffic, if we want to do vertical scaling, in other words if we want to increase CPU & RAM, then we need ...

item.title: API
item.description: ✅ What is an API? API = Application Programming Interface It’s like a waiter in a restaurant — takes your order, gives it to the kitchen, brings food back.

item.title: System Design
item.description: For a DevOps engineer, the core focus in system design and architecture should be on Operability and Lifecycle Management.

item.title: LoadBalancers
item.description: Load balancers can be of two types - Layer 4 or Transport Layer Load Balancer Layer 7 or Application Layer Load Balancer, where SSL or TLS offloading can happen - SSL or TLS Offloading In other words, Load balancer can work as any of two layers of OSI model - Layer 4 or Layer 7.

item.title: SSL or TLS Offloading
item.description: SSL Offloading (more accurately called TLS Offloading as SSL is an older, less secure protocol that TLS superseded, but the term “SSL” stuck) is a technique where the process of encrypting and decrypting secure network traffic (HTTPS) is moved from your backend web servers to a dedicated device, typ...

item.title: L 16 - The OSI Reference Model (Part 3)
item.description: Transport Layer Port addressing - sender sends the data over some port and at the receiver end also the data is delivered to some port in which the concerned process/service must be listening.

item.title: L 23 - Basics of Cisco Packet Tracer (Part 3) - Switch
item.description: Tutorial Link - youtu.be/eFY6mi3lmRQ .

item.title: L 22 - Basics of Cisco Packet Tracer (Part 2) - Hub
item.description: Tutorial Link - youtu.be/FZ8hRDakHvI Hub comes under star topology.
